files.description: Pulse scout classification of present, missing, and insufficient G.1-G.3 evidence artifacts.

missing_evidence.reason: No archived external GerryChain/ReCom trace package was found for the G.1-G.3 headline claims.
missing_evidence.next_step: Add or generate a trace package with diagnostics before citing external-ensemble percentiles.

missing_evidence.reason: No hash-bound election input model was found for G.2 partisan outcome claims.
missing_evidence.next_step: Package the election source, vote fields, normalization, and district aggregation model.

missing_evidence.reason: No hash-bound compactness metric output was found for G.1/G.3 percentile claims.
missing_evidence.next_step: Package metric version, inputs, plan outputs, and percentile computation transcript.

missing_evidence.reason: No G.1-G.3-specific RPLAN baseline package was found.
missing_evidence.next_step: Attach deterministic BISECT RPLAN output for every compared state/scenario.

missing_evidence.reason: No G.1-G.3-specific RCTX context package was found.
missing_evidence.next_step: Attach the corresponding unit universe, graph, population, geometry, and source hashes.

missing_evidence.reason: No external trace convergence, ESS, R-hat, or acceptance diagnostic package was found for the headline claims.
missing_evidence.next_step: Package sampler diagnostics alongside the external traces.
